name: stack_composition_v1
description: Stack composition training dataset covering all five composition categories: sequential workflows, parallel workflows, upstream/downstream two-phase execution, single-adapter degenerate stacks, and max-depth (8-16 adapter) compositions. 750 examples spanning design rationale, operational behavior, hash semantics, and performance budgeting.

entries.notes: 750 examples across five composition subcategories: sequential (150), parallel (150), upstream_downstream (150), single_adapter (100), max_depth (200)

provenance.review_notes: Stack composition dataset covering design rationale, execution semantics, hash stability, memory budgeting, and latency allocation for all workflow types

intent: Teach the model to reason about adapter stack composition: how to combine adapters, which workflow type to choose, what effective-stack hashes mean, how to allocate latency budgets across deep stacks, and when to prefer each composition pattern.
